summary: Frontend E2E testing of DentalFlow AI (Italian SaaS for dental studios). Executed comprehensive Playwright flows against the public preview URL covering: login (valid/invalid), dashboard KPIs+panels, patients list/filter/search/detail+dialogs, estimates list/filter/create, appointments views/date-nav/status/create, payments/installments/new-plan, settings+team+invite, global search, logout, mobile viewport and brute-force lockout. ~45/48 flows PASS. No blocking bugs identified. 3 minor testid-naming deviations vs review-request spec (functionality works).

testid_naming_deviations.actual: global-search-input, search-results container (individual result buttons lack testid)
testid_naming_deviations.impact: functionality OK, but search-result-N selector per review request missing

flows_verified.dashboard_kpis_all_four_numeric: PREVENTIVI APERTI=7, ACCETTATO=16.905 €, APPUNTAMENTI OGGI=0, CREDITI DA INCASSARE=7109 €
flows_verified.appts_status_select_on_row: exists on list view (41 rows); select fires backend call

action_items: OPTIONAL (testid alignment only): Add aliases / rename testids to match review-request spec if stability matters to external agents: patients-filter-*, est-new-btn, est-title/est-amount/est-save-btn, appts-prev-btn/appts-next-btn, topbar-search-input.
OPTIONAL: Add data-testid='topbar-search-result-{id}' on each button inside the search-results dropdown to enable reliable item-level automation.
critical_code_review_comments: No files exceed 700 lines among the pages reviewed (Estimates.jsx, Appointments.jsx, Patients.jsx, TopBar.jsx).
MongoDB ObjectId not leaking in responses (rows render cleanly with UUID-style ids).
Italian error copy 'Credenziali non valide' renders correctly on 401.
Brute-force protection works end-to-end via public URL (429 on the 6th attempt).
Seed data is rich and present for all dashboard widgets (8 solleciti, 3 follow-up, 23 preventivi, 41 appointments, 6 team members).

success_rate.frontend: ~96% (45/47 explicit checks pass; remaining 2 are testid-naming mismatches, not bugs)

seed_data_creation: Test POSTs created during run: 1 call log entry on a patient timeline, 1 estimate titled 'TEST Preventivo E2E' (1234 €). No cleanup performed — main agent may wish to purge TEST_* prefixed data if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical flows verified on preview URL. If review request demands exact testid names (patients-filter-*, est-new-btn, topbar-search-input, appts-prev-btn, topbar-search-result-N), ask main agent to add them — current code uses slightly different but consistent naming and functionality is intact. Auth model uses Bearer token from localStorage 'df_access_token'; cookies irrelevant for SPA. Brute-force lockout is IP+email keyed for 15 min — account for this when retesting login repeatedly from same preview IP.
